name: crysis-os-monorepo
description: CRYSIS_OS - Real-time Emergency Response System (Monorepo with Admin & Citizen Apps)

scripts.dev: npm run dev:admin & npm run dev:citizen
scripts.dev:admin: cd apps/admin && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:citizen: cd apps/citizen && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:solo: cd apps/admin && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/admin && npm install && cd ../citizen && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:citizen
scripts.start: npm run start:admin & npm run start:citizen
